title: hedysarum cochinchinense
intro: Hedysarum cochinchinense, also known as the Vietnamese or Chinese sarsaparilla, is a plant species in the pea family Fabaceae. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal effects. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions like eczema and acne. In herbal preparations, Hedysarum cochinchinense is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as being formulated into capsules and tinctures for its medicinal and therapeutic properties.
